title: begonia neglecta
intro: Begonia neglecta, also known as Begonia x Corallina, is a hybrid Begonia plant that is known for its stunning white and pink flowers and attractive foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The Begonia neglecta plant has been used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and skin irritations, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-aging properties, which can help to promote overall health and well-being. Begonia neglecta can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin.
